---
title: "Conteneurs & MicroVMs"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Conteneurs & MicroVMs

## Docker — Le standard

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Isolation | Namespace + cgroups |
| Latence démarrage | ~1-5s |
| Persistance | Volumes, images |
| Network | Bridge, custom networks |
| Écosystème | Immense (Docker Hub) |

```python
# Exemple: OpenHands sandbox (Docker)
import docker

client = docker.from_env()
container = client.containers.run(
    "openhands/sandbox:latest",
    command="python script.py",
    volumes={"./workspace": {"bind": "/workspace", "mode": "rw"}},
    network_mode="none",  # Pas d'internet
    mem_limit="2g",
    cpu_period=100000,
    cpu_quota=50000,  # 50% CPU
    remove=True  # Éphémère
)
```

## Podman — Daemonless, rootless

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Isolation | Namespace + cgroups (rootless) |
| Latence démarrage | ~1-5s |
| Docker compatible | ✅ (drop-in replacement) |
| Rootless | ✅ (par défaut) |
| Pods | ✅ (Kubernetes-like) |

::: callout-tip
## Podman pour la sécurité
Podman tourne rootless par défaut, réduisant la surface d'attaque. Idéal pour les sandboxes d'agents IA qui exécutent du code non fiable.
:::

## Firecracker — MicroVM

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Isolation | KVM-based MicroVM |
| Latence démarrage | ~125ms |
| Overhead | Minimal (~5MB RAM) |
| Sécurité | Isolation VM-level |
| Utilisé par | AWS Lambda, Fargate, Fly.io |

**Features** : Démarrage ultra-rapide, isolation forte (KVM), rate-limiting intégré, pas de device passthrough.

```python
# Exemple conceptuel Firecracker
# Nécessite l'API Firecracker
import subprocess

# Démarrer une microVM
subprocess.run([
    "firecracker",
    "--api-sock", "/tmp/firecracker.sock",
    "--config-file", "vm_config.json"
])
```

## Kata Containers — Container + VM

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Isolation | VM légère par container |
| Latence démarrage | ~1-2s |
| Docker compatible | ✅ (via containerd) |
| Kubernetes | ✅ (CRI-O, containerd) |

## gVisor — Kernel sandbox

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Isolation | User-space kernel (ptrace/KVM) |
| Latence démarrage | ~2-5s |
| Docker compatible | ✅ (`--runtime=runsc`) |
| Overhead | ~10-20% perf |

## Comparatif

| Solution | Isolation | Latence | Overhead | Sécurité | Complexité |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|----------|------------|
| Docker | Container | 1-5s | Faible | Moyenne | Faible |
| Podman | Container (rootless) | 1-5s | Faible | Bonne | Faible |
| Firecracker | MicroVM | 125ms | Minimal | Excellente | Moyenne |
| Kata | VM + container | 1-2s | Modéré | Excellente | Moyenne |
| gVisor | User-space kernel | 2-5s | Modéré | Bonne | Faible |

::: callout-note
## Choix par cas d'usage
- **Dev local** → Docker ou Podman (simplicité)
- **Production multi-tenant** → Firecracker (isolation + vitesse)
- **Kubernetes enterprise** → Kata (compatibilité + sécurité)
- **Code non fiable** → gVisor ou Firecracker (isolation maximale)
:::

## Outils découverts automatiquement

<!-- TOOLS_SANDBOX_START -->
### [firecracker](https://github.com/firecracker-microvm/firecracker)
Secure and fast microVMs for serverless computing.

⭐ 35.5k | `Rust` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `containers`, `minimalist`, `open-source`, `oversubscription`, `rust`, `sandbox`, `serverless`, `virtual-machine`

### [gvisor](https://github.com/google/gvisor)
Application Kernel for Containers

⭐ 18.8k | `Go` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `containers`, `docker`, `kernel`, `kubernetes`, `linux`, `oci`, `sandbox`

### [wasmtime](https://github.com/bytecodealliance/wasmtime)
A lightweight WebAssembly runtime that is fast, secure, and standards-compliant

⭐ 18.4k | `Rust` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `aot`, `cranelift`, `jit`, `lightweight`, `portable`, `runtime`, `rust`, `sandbox`

### [memU](https://github.com/NevaMind-AI/memU)
Personal memory across agents

⭐ 14.0k | `Python` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agent-memory`, `claude-skills`, `harness`, `loop-engineering`, `mcp`, `memory`, `openclaw`, `openclaw-skills`

### [OpenSandbox](https://github.com/opensandbox-group/OpenSandbox)
Secure, Fast, and Extensible Sandbox runtime for AI agents.

⭐ 12.0k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agent`, `ai-infra`, `kubernetes`, `sandbox`

### [CubeSandbox](https://github.com/TencentCloud/CubeSandbox)
Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.

⭐ 10.4k | `Rust` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agents`, `container`, `sandbox`

### [astrid](https://github.com/astrid-runtime/astrid)
Astrid is a portable, capability-secure operating system for composable software.

⭐ 10.3k | `Rust` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agent-runtime`, `ai-agents`, `capability-security`, `llm`, `mcp`, `microkernel`, `rust`, `sandbox`

### [openbrowser](https://github.com/ntegrals/openbrowser)
Let AI agents browse the web. An autonomous toolkit for browser-based AI agents.

⭐ 9.5k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `ai-agents`, `automation`, `claude`, `playwright`, `puppeteer`, `sandbox`

### [react-cosmos](https://github.com/react-cosmos/react-cosmos)
Sandbox for developing and testing UI components in isolation

⭐ 8.7k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-14
**Tags** : `components`, `devtools`, `react`, `sandbox`, `testing`, `ui`

### [OpenTTD](https://github.com/OpenTTD/OpenTTD)
OpenTTD is an open source simulation game based upon Transport Tycoon Deluxe

⭐ 8.1k | `C++` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `game`, `isometric`, `openttd`, `sandbox`, `simulation`

### [wasm3](https://github.com/wasm3/wasm3)
🚀 A fast WebAssembly interpreter and the most universal WASM runtime

⭐ 8.0k | `C` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-15
**Tags** : `containers`, `cosmopolitan`, `devops`, `edge-computing`, `embedded`, `iot`, `sandbox`, `scripting`

### [omnigent](https://github.com/omnigent-ai/omnigent)
Omnigent is an open-source AI agent framework and meta-harness: orchestrate Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Pi, and custom agents — swap harnesses without rewriting, enforce policies and sandboxing, an...

⭐ 7.4k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agent-framework`, `agent-governance`, `agent-orchestration`, `agents`, `ai`, `ai-agent`, `ai-agents`, `claude-code`

### [microsandbox](https://github.com/superradcompany/microsandbox)
🧱 easy, fast and local-first microVM runtime

⭐ 7.0k | `Rust` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agents`, `docker`, `golang`, `linux`, `local`, `macos`, `microvm`, `nodejs`

### [fragments](https://github.com/e2b-dev/fragments)
Open-source Next.js template for building apps that are fully generated by AI. By E2B.

⭐ 6.3k | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-code-generation`, `anthropic`, `claude`, `claude-ai`, `code-interpreter`, `e2b`, `javascript`

### [x11docker](https://github.com/mviereck/x11docker)
Run GUI applications and desktops in docker and podman containers. Focus on security.

⭐ 6.3k | `Shell` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-16
**Tags** : `containers`, `desktop`, `docker`, `gpu`, `gui`, `html5`, `nerdctl`, `podman`

### [Wllama](https://github.com/ngxson/wllama)
WebAssembly binding for llama.cpp - Enabling in-browser LLM inference

⭐ 1.1k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `llama`, `llamacpp`, `llm`, `wasm`, `webassembly`

### [Greywall](https://github.com/GreyhavenHQ/greywall)
Deny-by-default command sandbox for AI coding agents with filesystem isolation, network control via transparent proxy, built-in profiles for agents like Claude Code or OpenCode, and learning mode f...

⭐ 266 | `Go` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-15
**Tags** : `agents`, `ai-security`, `claude-code`, `developer-tools`, `greyproxy`, `landlock`, `linux`, `llm`

### [Containarium](https://github.com/FootprintAI/Containarium)
Open-source agent runtime — SSH-native isolation, eBPF egress policy, Kubernetes + LXC backends, GPU passthrough, MCP-native CLI

⭐ 261 | `Go` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agent-native`, `agent-runtime`, `agent-sandbox`, `agentic-ai`, `ai-agents`, `claude`, `code-sandbox`, `cursor`

### [sandboxes](https://github.com/nalgeon/sandboxes)
Sandboxes for running code and tools

⭐ 127 | `Shell` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `codapi`, `code-sandbox`, `sandbox`

### [sample-autonomous-cloud-coding-agents](https://github.com/aws-samples/sample-autonomous-cloud-coding-agents)
Autonomous background coding agents on AWS. Turn tasks into pull requests via isolated runtimes, with built-in orchestration, observability, and governance.

⭐ 111 | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT-0 | MAJ: 2026-07-14
**Tags** : `agent-sandbox`, `agentcore`, `autonomous-agents`, `aws`, `background-agents`, `code-sandbox`, `coding-agents`, `dark-factory`

<!-- TOOLS_SANDBOX_END -->
